title: Bare Bone's Basic's
description: This Modpack aims to make Minecraft look like the trailers
body:
This modpack aims to make Minecraft look and feel like the trailers while also improving things like FPS, the F3 menu, and a more easily readable statistics screen, along with a fresh UI. It uses Fresh Animations to make mobs feel more alive, and the Essential Mod makes it easy to create a world and invite your friends. It’s entirely client-side, so you can use it on whatever servers you like.

Here's a list of the mods, shaders and resource included,
all credit goes to the origanal creators.

Fabric API By Modmuss50 and Player7457.

Sodium By Jellysqiud3, Douira and IMS.

Iris Shaders By Coderbot and IMS.

Mod Menu By Prospecter, Modmuss and Gniftygnome

[ETF] Entity Texture Features By Traben

[EMF] Entity Model Features By Traben

Complementary Shaders - Reimagined By EminGT

Fresh Animations By FreshLX

Essential Mod By SparkUniverse

BetterF3 By TreyRuffy and Cominixo

Better Advancements By Way2muchnoise

Cubes Without Borders By Kira-NT

Better Mount HUD By Lortseam

Better Statistics Screen By TheCSDev

Freecam (Modrinth edition) By hashalite

Bare Bones By RobotPants

Better Block Entities By Cseden and adre278

Bare Bones x Fresh Animations By Specimen

Fresh Animations: Player Extension By FreshLX

Unique Dark Refined By Amongsreality

Bare Bones x Fresh Animations: Player Extension By Ludo_silver_
